reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar, super recomendable para pasar la noche incluye desayuno.
Precio/ calidad excelente.

(Translated by Google)
A very good place, highly recommended for an overnight stay, including breakfast.
Excellent value for money.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1d1lfVlpBEAE

reviews.comment:
Pésima higiene en ambos baños.
Sugiero q reemplacen la única máquina de café que está toda encintada y en cualquier momento se quedan sin ella.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible hygiene in both bathrooms.
I suggest they replace the only coffee machine, which is all taped up and could run out at any moment.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1d2VQOGZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buen prestación en el servicio... en cuanto al cobro del combustible si se puede pagar con QR... en el shop No...!!! Pero en general muy bien..!!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service... regarding fuel payments, you can pay with QR code... but not at the convenience store...!!! But overall, very good!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1d2NpZ2tBRRAB

(Translated by Google)
Nice but the prices are endless

reviews.comment:
Pocos empleados 1 o 2 cómo mucho ,se arman largas colas de espera !!! Los q venimos en viaje se pierde mucho tiempo esperando,servicio lo básico

(Translated by Google)
Few employees, 1 or 2 at most, and long lines form! Those of us who travel waste a lot of time waiting. Basic service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1OHRpOW53RRAB

reviews.comment:
Una vergüenza que solo pongan a una persona para cargar combustible! Largas colas de espera.. un solo surtidor. Tendría que venir alguna otra estación a hacer competencia para ver si se ponen un poco las pilas.

(Translated by Google)
It's a disgrace that they only have one person pumping fuel! Long queues... and only one pump. They need another station to come and compete to see if they'll finally step up their game.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1MHEyUENnEAE

reviews.comment:
Baños sucios, atención mala,largas filas para cargar combustible

(Translated by Google)
Dirty bathrooms, bad service, long lines for fuel
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1a283bWRBEAE

reviews.comment:
No mucho para decir. Te saca de apuro básicamente porque son 200km sin ninguna estación. Ricos sándwiches Atencion maso y la nafta nada, YPF no es buena en absoluto.

(Translated by Google)
Not much to say. It gets you out of a pinch basically because it's 200km without a gas station. The sandwiches are good, the service is so-so, and the gas is terrible; YPF is not good at all.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1NHRXbHVBRRAB

reviews.comment:
¡No había NAFTA ni de ida ni de vuelta de Santiago!!! Cola para una mísera moneda de la máquina para el Agua caliente!!!
Desastre!

(Translated by Google)
There was no gas either way to or from Santiago!!! A line for a measly coin for the hot water machine!!!
Disaster!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1b3RTUFZREAE

reviews.comment:
Un lugar justo para hacer un párate y seguir el viaje , la gente es muy amable

(Translated by Google)
A perfect place to stop and continue your journey; the people are very friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1d3M3OUtREAE

reviews.comment:
Un desastre la atención, en todo los sentidos posibles Tomen precauciones para no tener que cargar ahí. Abusan de su ubicación estratégica.

(Translated by Google)
The service is a disaster in every way. Take precautions to avoid having to carry your luggage there. They take advantage of their strategic location.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1d3F5YlBBEAE

reviews.comment:
Cuando fui a Córdoba no tenían combustible. Y cuando regrese cargaban primero a los que llegaban con bidones de 20 litros algunos que venían en camionetas de políticos y los que hacíamos la fila esperábamos. Perdí 1 hora con 7 autos antes. Una vergüenza.

(Translated by Google)
When I went to Córdoba, they had no fuel. And when I returned, they were prioritizing those who arrived with 20-liter jerrycans, some of whom came in politicians' SUVs, while those of us in line waited. I lost an hour, with seven cars ahead of me. It was a disgrace.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1M05mSnJBRRAB
